item.title: Book Riot’s Deals of the Day for February 11, 2026
item.description: A time slip King Arthur reimagining, a second chance Sapphic romance, a charismatic lake-dwelling monster, and more of today's book deals.

item.title: 100+ Black-Owned Bookstores in the U.S.
item.description: There are hundreds of Black-owned bookstores in the U.S. to explore! Check them out here, sorted by state.

item.title: New Nonfiction by Black Authors to Read in 2026
item.description: From a memoir by Jesmyn Ward and Kimberlé Crenshaw to a new release by Ibram X. Kendi, these are the best new Black nonfiction books to read in 2026.

item.title: Criminally In Love: Mystery & Crime & Romance In One
item.description: Amateur sleuths, professional investigators, and even contract killers dibble and dabble in these romantic mysteries and thrillers.

item.title: Minneapolis Comic & Bookstore Owner Greg Ketter Emerges as a Symbol of Protest Against ICE Actions
item.description: Graphic novel sales have risen 9%, LORE OLYMOUS is getting adapted, season 2 of ONE PIECE, and more.
